description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI macos that triggers on push events. Run a macos-latest job with a matrix strategy for Debug and Release build types. Check out the repository, install required packages with Homebrew, set up depot tools, fetch the WebRTC repository, build with CMake and make, create a package with CPack, and upload the artifact. If the workflow is triggered by a tag, create a GitHub release with the artifact.
